prompt: Do I have any notes on embedding models? Specifically around how different models compare for retrieval tasks.

assertions.name: honest-sparse-reporting
assertions.description: If only sparse content exists (e.g., a meeting mention), response reports it accurately without inflating into a full answer

assertions.name: unread-sources-flagged
assertions.description: Any unread or unprocessed sources are flagged as unverified rather than cited as authoritative

assertions.name: gap-suggestion-provided
assertions.description: Response suggests specific next steps for filling the knowledge gap (ingest a resource, create an atom)

assertions.name: grep-fallback-transparent
assertions.description: If grep was used instead of graph traversal, the response says so
